title: Self Stirring Automatic Electric Mixing Mug Borosilicate Glass for Home/Office/Travel Self Stirring Cup for Milk/Protein Powder/Coffee/Eggs 2 AAA Batteries Included By The Chosen Ones 23
description:
About this item
This Mixing Mug stirs up a variety of drinks and more, such as Coffee, Hot Chocolate, Protein Powders, Eggs, Pancake Batter and other powdered drinks.
With a push of a button, you can watch your favorite drink being mixed automatically.
Easy to disassemble and clean, however, do not submerge the lid in water for cleaning.
Automatic spillproof lid, Mug made of High Borosilicate Glass that can withstand boiling water with a Plastic Wood Like Handle and Lid.
Makes the perfect gift for yourself or a loved one for any occassion.
reviews_5s:
Lo compre para un regalo y mi hija quedó encantada!! Lo puso para adornar en el counter de la cocina pues se ve muy fino, además es muy útil, ya que puedes agitar tu café, chocolate o tu bebida favorita, rápido y beberla en la misma taza….I saw this cup in social media and quickly decided to get one. It's super cute and works so easily. Great for taking your drinks on the go and mixing them.Love when a tool is capable of doing double-duty thereby making it twice as useful. I'd seen other similar cups advertising the same purpose but I have to admit I didn't love the idea of having a magnetic pill in the bottom of my cup spinning around. This style was much more preferable and I found it was very effective.

I'm aware it says the glass is Borosilicate and is meant to be much more durable and able to withstand high heats but I have to admit there's something fragile 'feeling' about it. I wish they could make it a little bit thicker. I'm constantly terrified this is going to shatter in my hands. Outside of that it does a very good job. Cap is just a basic cork that doesn't fully close which can be tricky the first few times you use it. Once you get used to it though the process goes a lot smoother.Love the self stirring aspect, allows to pour and drink. It is the perfect gift.I gave this to my friend as a gift. I love it!
